samples.xml_description:
<module id="asyn_fifo">
    <description>An asynchronous FIFO with configurable depth and width.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="wclk">Write clock.</input>
        <input id="rclk">Read clock.</input>
        <input id="wrstn">Write reset.</input>
        <input id="rrstn">Read reset.</input>
        <input id="winc">Write increment.</input>
        <input id="rinc">Read increment.</input>
        <input id="wdata" width_description="[WIDTH-1:0]">Write data.</input>
        <output id="wfull">Write full.</output>
        <output id="rempty">Read empty.</output>
        <output id="rdata" width_description="[WIDTH-1:0]">Read data.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <parameter id="WIDTH" value="8">FIFO data width.</parameter>
        <parameter id="DEPTH" value="16">FIFO depth.</parameter>
    </parameter_description>
    <logic_description type="combinational_logic">
        <signal id="wen" width_description="[1:0]">Write enable.</signal>
        <signal id="ren" width_description="[1:0]">Read enable.</signal>
        <signal id="waddr" width_description="[($clog2(DEPTH))-1:0]">Write address.</signal>
        <signal id="raddr" width_description="[($clog2(DEPTH))-1:0]">Read address.</signal>
        <signal id="waddr_bin" width_description="[($clog2(DEPTH))-1:0]">Binary write address.</signal>
        <signal id="raddr_bin" width_description="[($clog2(DEPTH))-1:0]">Binary read address.</signal>
        <signal id="wptr" width_description="[($clog2(DEPTH))+1:0]">Write pointer.</signal>
        <signal id="rptr" width_description="[($clog2(DEPTH))+1:0]">Read pointer.</signal>
        <signal id="wptr_buff" width_description="[($clog2(DEPTH))+1:0]">Buffer write pointer.</signal>
        <signal id="rptr_buff" width_description="[($clog2(DEPTH))+1:0]">Buffer read pointer.</signal>
        <signal id="wptr_syn" width_description="[($clog2(DEPTH))+1:0]">Synchronized write pointer.</signal>
        <signal id="rptr_syn" width_description="[($clog2(DEPTH))+1:0]">Synchronized read pointer.</signal>
        
        // Assigning signals
        assign wen[0] = winc;
        assign wen[1] = (wptr == {~(rptr[$clog2(DEPTH)+1]), rptr[$clog2(DEPTH):1]});
        assign ren[0] = rinc;
        assign ren[1] = (wptr == rptr);
        assign waddr = waddr_bin[$clog2(DEPTH)-1:0];
        assign raddr = raddr_bin[$clog2(DEPTH)-1:0];
        assign wfull = (wptr == {~(rptr[$clog2(DEPTH)+1]), rptr[$clog2(DEPTH):1]});
        assign rempty = (wptr == rptr);
        assign rdata = ram.rdata;
    </logic_description>
    <implementation>
        // Dual-port RAM instantiation
        dual_port_RAM #(DEPTH, WIDTH) ram (
            .wclk(wclk),
            .wenc(wen[0]),
            .waddr(waddr),
            .wdata(wdata),
            .rclk(rclk),
            .renc(ren[0]),
            .raddr(raddr),
            .rdata(rdata)
        );
        // Write Pointer Logic
        always @(posedge wclk or negedge wrstn) begin
            if (!wrstn) begin
                waddr_bin <= 'b0;
            end else if (winc && !wfull) begin
                waddr_bin <= waddr_bin + 1;
            end
        end
        always @(posedge wclk or negedge wrstn) begin
            if (!wrstn) begin
                wptr <= 'b0;
            end else begin
                wptr <= {waddr_bin[$clog2(DEPTH)], ^waddr_bin} ^ (wptr >> 1);
            end
        end
        // Read Pointer Logic
        always @(posedge rclk or negedge rrstn) begin
            if (!rrstn) begin
                raddr_bin <= 'b0;
            end else if (rinc && !rempty) begin
                raddr_bin <= raddr_bin + 1;
            end
        end
        always @(posedge rclk or negedge rrstn) begin
            if (!rrstn) begin
                rptr <= 'b0;
            end else begin
                rptr <= {raddr_bin[$clog2(DEPTH)], ^raddr_bin} ^ (rptr >> 1);
            end
        end
        // Buffer Registers
        always @(posedge wclk or negedge wrstn) begin
            if (!wrstn) begin
                wptr_buff <= 'b0;
            end else begin
                wptr_buff <= wptr;
            end
        end
        always @(posedge rclk or negedge rrstn) begin
            if (!rrstn) begin
                rptr_buff <= 'b0;
            end else begin
                rptr_buff <= rptr;
            end
        end
        // Synchronization Logic
        always @(posedge wclk or negedge wrstn) begin
            if (!wrstn) begin
                wptr_syn <= 'b0;
            end else begin
                wptr_syn <= wptr_buff;
            end
        end
        always @(posedge rclk or negedge rrstn) begin
            if (!rrstn) begin
                rptr_syn <= 'b0;
            end else begin
                rptr_syn <= rptr_buff;
            end
        end
    </implementation>
    
    <task>
        <step id="1">Understand the requirements of the asynchronous FIFO.</step>
        <step id="2">Design the dual-port RAM module.</step>
        <step id="3">Design the write and read controllers.</step>
        <step id="4">Design the read and write pointer synchronizers.</step>
        <step id="5">Design the empty and full flags.</step>
        <step id="6">Test the FIFO module.</step>
    </task>
</module>
